'''jamatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leachant|leachant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leachant|leachant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jamatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæmæthæth|jæmæthæth]] || [[word:jæmæthæj|jæmæthæj]] || [[word:jæmæthæsh|jæmæthæsh]] || [[word:jæmæthæ|jæmæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jamamathath|jamamathath]] || [[word:jamamathaj|jamamathaj]] || [[word:jamamathash|jamamathash]] || [[word:jamamatha|jamamatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jamathath|jamathath]] || [[word:jamathaj|jamathaj]] || [[word:jamathash|jamathash]] || [[word:jamatha|jamatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jamafthath|jamafthath]] || [[word:jamafthaj|jamafthaj]] || [[word:jamafthash|jamafthash]] || [[word:jamafthaf|jamafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jamathatha|jamathatha]] || [[word:jamathaja|jamathaja]] || [[word:jamathasha|jamathasha]] || [[word:jamathaka|jamathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jamathath|jamathath]] || [[word:jamathaj|jamathaj]] || [[word:jamathash|jamathash]] || [[word:jamatha|jamatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jamathathal|jamathathal]] || [[word:jamathajal|jamathajal]] || [[word:jamathashal|jamathashal]] || [[word:jamathakal|jamathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jamathathatha|jamathathatha]] || [[word:jamathajaja|jamathajaja]] || [[word:jamathashasha|jamathashasha]] || [[word:jamathaka|jamathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jamathathan|jamathathan]] || [[word:jamathajan|jamathajan]] || [[word:jamathashan|jamathashan]] || [[word:jamathakan|jamathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jamathathaoro|jamathathaoro]] || [[word:jamathajaoro|jamathajaoro]] || [[word:jamathashaoro|jamathashaoro]] || [[word:jamathakaoro|jamathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
